ARCN-000.name: 0. THE BARD
ARCN-000.effect 1: [If Attacking] Gain 1 AP for the battle.
ARCN-000.effect 2: [If Attacking] [Arcana Purge 1] Rest and seal 1 enemy card.
ARCN-000.effect 3: [If Blocking] [Arcana Purge 1] Rest and seal 1 enemy card.

ARCN-001.name: I. THE MAGE
ARCN-001.effect 1: [If Attacking] Gain 1 AP for the battle.
ARCN-001.effect 2: [If Attacking] [Arcana Purge 1] Rest and seal 1 enemy card.
ARCN-001.effect 3: [If Blocking] [Arcana Purge 1] Rest and seal 1 enemy card.

face.name: II. THE HIGH-PRIESTESS
face.effect 1: [If Attacking] Gain 1 AP for the battle.
face.effect 2: [If Attacking] [Arcana Purge 1] Discard 1 enemy equip card.
face.effect 3: [If Blocking] [Arcana Purge 1] Discard 1 enemy equip card.

ARCN-020.effect 3: [If Blocking] [Arcana Purge 1] Rest and seal 1 enemy card.
